candidates.description: Regime-adaptive strategy that switches between trend-following and range-bound modes based on ADX and volatility state

trend_mode.entry: Price above fast_ema AND RSI in bullish range AND volume_above_average

range_mode.entry: Price near lower_bollinger AND RSI oversold recovering AND volume_spike

exit_logic.trend_exit: Price below slow_ema OR RSI overbought OR trailing_stop
exit_logic.range_exit: Price at bb_middle OR RSI neutral OR fixed_stop

multi_pair_robustness.regime_detection: Uses ADX and volatility to detect market state, applies appropriate logic per regime
multi_pair_robustness.no_pair_hardcoding: Entry/exit conditions are pair-agnostic, based on universal indicators
multi_pair_robustness.balanced_parameter_count: 12 parameters total, focused on regime detection and signal quality

candidates.description: Momentum continuation strategy with volatility quality and volume confirmation filters, not pullback-only

entry_logic.primary_condition: Strong momentum detected via price change and volume
entry_logic.entry: Price_change > threshold AND volume_quality AND volatility_quality AND not_overextended

exit_logic.momentum_exit: Momentum weakens OR volume drops OR volatility contracts

multi_pair_robustness.momentum_universal: Momentum is a universal market phenomenon, not pair-specific
multi_pair_robustness.quality_filters: Volume and volatility quality filters ensure signal strength across pairs
multi_pair_robustness.not_pullback: Enters on momentum continuation, not pullback, avoiding TrendPullbackContinuation failure

candidates.description: Breakout retest strategy that avoids first breakout candle, waits for retest/hold confirmation with volume and ATR filters

entry_logic.breakout_detection: Price breaks above resistance or below support
entry_logic.retest_condition: Price returns to breakout level and holds
entry_logic.entry: Breakout confirmed AND retest successful AND volume_confirmation AND ATR_normal

multi_pair_robustness.breakout_universal: Breakouts are universal across markets, not pair-specific
multi_pair_robustness.retest_filter: Retest requirement avoids false breakouts that plagued VolatilityCompressionBreakout
multi_pair_robustness.volume_atr_filters: Volume and ATR filters ensure signal quality across pairs
multi_pair_robustness.not_simple_breakout: Requires retest confirmation, avoiding simple breakout failure
multi_pair_robustness.balanced_parameter_count: 10 parameters focused on breakout quality and confirmation

ranking.reasoning: Explicitly addresses regime dependency, applies appropriate logic per market state, most comprehensive approach to multi-pair robustness
Breakouts are universal, retest filter avoids false signals, directly addresses overtrading issue from VolatilityCompressionBreakout
Momentum is universal, quality filters ensure signal strength, avoids pullback-only failure mode

failure_mode_avoidance.MA_count_gap: None of the candidates use pure MA count/gap logic
failure_mode_avoidance.volatility_breakout: Breakout_retest_confirmation adds retest filter to avoid false breakouts
failure_mode_avoidance.trend_pullback: Momentum_continuation enters on continuation, not pullback
failure_mode_avoidance.mean_reversion_exhaustion: Regime_adaptive uses regime detection instead of pure mean reversion
failure_mode_avoidance.pair_specific: All candidates use universal indicators (ADX, volume, ATR, RSI) without pair hardcoding
failure_mode_avoidance.excessive_parameters: All candidates have 10-12 parameters, focused on signal quality
failure_mode_avoidance.future_looking: All candidates use standard lagging indicators with shift(1) where needed

recommendation_reason: Regime-adaptive strategy most directly addresses the fundamental failure mode discovered: strategies that work in one regime but fail in others. By explicitly detecting market state and applying appropriate logic, it has the highest potential for multi-pair robustness.
